**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-note" aria-hidden="true"></span> `note`

Limit source line length.

## Bad

```go
message := "a source line that extends beyond the configured maximum line length is reported"
```

## Good

```go
message := "keep source lines readable"
```
